title: Sugar
description: Sugar is a minecraft expansion mod that improves vanilla features and adds new vanilla styled items and tweaks!
body:
**Sugar is a minecraft expansion mod that improves vanilla features and adds new vanilla styled items and tweaks!**

![Sugar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55fd8d26d0ece966ec7c347bdac40a23f6ecedab_0.webp)

Configurable! Choose what tweaks and features you want! :)

**Mod Compat:**
- Create

**Current Features:**
- Right Click Harvest!
- Path to Dirt
- Brimcoal (Smelting Fuel, Upgrade from Coal/Charcoal)
- Totem of Retrial (Resets Omionous Trial Vaults or Converts Trial Vaults into Ominous Trial Vaults)
- Smelting Enchantment
- Placeable Items (Bread)
- Chickens Drop Feathers When Hit (Configurable)
- More Vanilla Recipes
- Cooked Carrots
- Reinforced Ladder (Hanging Ladders! Can be placed upwards or downwards similar to scaffolding.)
